info.title: Report Generation Web Services
info.description: REST Services for managing the Report Generation modeler.

get.summary: Get the Output Format using its id
Get the Output Format available library Output Formats

patch.summary: Update the report information with given content

delete.summary: Delete a report using its id

post.summary: Generate the reports which parameters are in body
post.description: For performance concern, a limit of 5 concurrent generations is applied. AcceptLanguage header can be used to set the language used for report generation.

post.summary: Gives the generation status for reports specified in request body

get.summary: Get the Report Template using its id

AcceptLanguage.name: Accept-Language
AcceptLanguage.description: The language to use (default will be session language)

ENO_CSRF_TOKEN.name: ENO_CSRF_TOKEN
ENO_CSRF_TOKEN.description: The CSFR Token to use for this request can be generated by URL: <3DSpaceBaseURL>/resources/v1/application/CSRF

SecurityContext.name: SecurityContext
SecurityContext.description: The Security Context to use for this request.

IdPathParam.name: id
IdPathParam.description: A physicalid that identifies an object to manipulate

WithChanges.name: withChanges
WithChanges.description: To produce change metadata information from a report to another

ModelCompression.name: modelCompression
ModelCompression.description: The expected format of the reportModelData attribute in exported data

OutputFormatCreationRequestBody.description: Use libraryFilename for sample output format otherwise use Document REST API to push a custom file.

ReportCreationRequestBody.description: It is mandatory to provide input values for each parameter of the template.

OutputFormatCreationSuccessResponse.description: Response sent when the request was completely executed

OutputFormatCreationPartialSuccessRespon.description: Response sent when the request was partially executed

SimpleSuccessResponse.description: Response sent when the request was successfully executed

ReportCreationSuccessResponse.description: Response sent when the request was completely executed

ReportCreationPartialSuccessResponse.description: Response sent when the request was partially executed

ReportSuccessResponse.description: Response sent when the request was successfully executed

TemplateCreationSuccessResponse.description: Response sent when the request was completely executed

TemplateCreationPartialSuccessResponse.description: Response sent when the request was partially executed

TemplateSuccessResponse.description: Response sent when the request was successfully executed

OutputFormatSuccessResponse.description: Response sent when the request was successfully executed

OutputFormatLibrarySuccessResponse.description: Response sent when the request was successfully executed

ReportGenerationStatusSuccessResponse.description: Response sent when the request was completely executed

ReportGenerationStatusPartialSuccessResp.description: Response sent when the request was partially executed

ReportGenerationSuccessResponse.description: Response sent when the request was completely executed

ReportGenerationPartialSuccessResponse.description: Response sent when the request was partially executed

ManagedObjectIdServerErrorResponse.description: An unexpected error occurred at server side

ManagedObjectCreationServerErrorResponse.description: An unexpected error occurred at server side

SimpleServerErrorResponse.description: An unexpected error occurred at server side

SimpleTooManyRequestIssue.description: This request has been launched too many times. The server shall treat the previous requests before accepting new ones.

message.example: The server received too many request

SimpleInvalidCSRFTokenResponse.description: The ENO_CSRF_TOKEN is missing or incorrect

SimpleAuthenticationIssueResponse.description: Element are missing or incorrect to authentify the user.

ManagedObjectCreationPartialSuccess.description: Success response but with data that could not be treated

ManagedObjectIdPartialSuccess.description: Success response but with data that could not be treated

Configuration.description: Object which id shall be the physicalid of a Product Configuration or a Predefined Configuration. The filterView parameter allows to define the view applied to filtered navigations

CsrfFilled.description: CSRF Token obtained from the server
CsrfFilled.title: CSRF

MessageOperationFailed.example: Message that describes the operation that was not executed or the failure.

MessageInvalidId.example: The identifier format is not correct: <theId>

MessageInvalidKeyInObject.example: An unexpected key has been found in request body: <theKey>

MessageRequestBodyExpectation.description: A message that indicates request body content does not match expectations such as something is missing or something was not expected.
MessageRequestBodyExpectation.example: No xxx found in request body

MessageTooManyReports.example: Too many reports for concurrent generation (limit: 5)

OutputFormatCreation.description: A schema definition to create an Output Format.

OutputFormatUpdate.description: A schema definition to update an Output Format.

OutputFormatId.description: Physicalid of a Report Output Format.

OutputFormatFileName.description: An Output Format file which is not necessarily from the library (it can be checked-in by user)

OutputFormatLibraryFileName.description: Use one of library output format provided by installation. See also GET /resources/v1/modeler/dsrgn/outputformat/library

OutputFormatLibraryFileNames.description: Sample Output format files provided by installation.

OutputFormatName.description: The Output Format name. An autoname will be set when this value is missing in case of creation.

OutputFormatPolicy.description: The Output Format policy. Default is set at creation when it is not specified.

ReportCreation.description: It is mandatory to provide input values for each parameter of the template.

ReportUpdate.description: A schema definition to update a Report.

lastDuration.description: Optional duration of the last report generation when available

running.description: Optional progress details when a report generation is running

timePassed.description: The time passed in seconds since the beginning of the report generation

timeRemaining.description: Optional remaining time estimation based on last duration

timeExceeded.description: Optional exceeding time based on last duration

percent.description: The progression percentage based on last duration when available. It can remain at 90% until completion in case estimated time is exceeded.

ReportGenerationStatus.description: A Report basic description with generation and target document information

ReportModelCurrent.description: The Report Model policy current state

ReportName.description: An autoname will be set when this value is missing in case of creation.

ReportInputs.description: A list of list of input ids. It shall correspond to the template definition. If the template has 2 input types (1st cardinality Single, 2nd cardinality List): [[input1physicalid1], [input2physicalid1, input2physicalid2]]

ReportInputValues.description: The list of physicalids for one input parameter of the report.

items.description: Detailed information about what object cannot be treated and why.

TargetDocumentReferenceObject.description: Object reference for access with dedicated API

allOf.description: Field kept for compatibility and for consistency with other schemas. It is a duplicate information considering that object reference adds identifier field.

id.description: The id of generated report file if any

fileName.description: The name of generated report file if any

fileVersion.description: The current version number of the file (this is the version that will be downloaded)

TargetDocumentId.description: An object with id designating the Target Document to use (DOCUMENTS subtype).

TemplateCreation.description: A schema definition to create a Report Template.

TemplateUpdate.description: A schema definition to update a Report Template.

items.description: Detailed information about what object cannot be treated and why.

referenceIndex.description: Index of object that could not be treated

TemplateId.description: Object which id shall be the physicalid of a Report Template.

TemplateModelInput.description: Object representing the Report Template information in request body.

TemplateName.description: The Report Template name. An autoname will be set when this value is missing in case of creation.

TemplatePolicy.description: The Report Template policy. Default is set at creation when it is not specified.

TemplateType.description: The Report Template type. Default is set at creation when it is not specified.

TemplateModelOutput.description: Object representing the Report Template information provided in response.

TemplateInput.description: Read-only information about a template input.

nature.description:
Assumption of parameter nature based on type qualified name.
- primitive when type is Standard.Integer, Standard.String, Standard.Boolean and Standard.Real types,
- plmrel when type format is PLM.rel_XXX,
- plmbus when type format is PLM.xxx,
- other for types that do not match previous cases.

TemplateData.description: The Template internal data in compressed or XML format. Response return compressed version by default.

data.description: Report Template data in a compressed format (GZIP compression and Base64 encoding)
Report Template data in a raw format
data.example: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><DocumentList><Document name1="TPL1" dmVersion="1" lastDataId="1"><Structure type="paragraph"><DataTerminalText text1="Dummy text"/></Structure></Document></DocumentList>
